444 USLT - Latina/o Studies

USLT - Latina/o Studies

USLT201 U.S. Latina/o Studies I: An Historical Overview to the 1960's (3 Credits)

Interdisciplinary course focusing on demographics, terminology

and social constructs of race, class, ethnicity, indigeneity, gender,

and sexuality associated with the historical and political roots of US Latinidades. Examines the formation, evolution an adaptation of US Latina/o communities as critical field of inquiry.

USLT202 US Latina/o Studies II: A Contemporary Overview 1960's to present (3 Credits)
